looking forward to meeting with you and the rest of the Enron Leadership 
Council.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Sincerely,

Jeff Dasovich

Regards,

Shirley Crenshaw
Enron India

Jeff,

I am writing to urge you to support the California Energy Commission's 
proposed rate increase for the wholesale electricity market.  The proposed 
increase is a fair and reasonable approach to address the state's energy 
shortage.  The proposed increase is consistent with the commission's other rate 
increases for the wholesale electricity market.

The proposed increase is a rate of $0.056 per kilowatt hour, which is approximately the same as the 
rate of $0.056 per kilowatt hour that the California Public Utilities Commission 
recently approved for the wholesale electricity market.  The proposed increase is 
based on the average price of electricity

Conference.  The Power Marketing Association is pleased to announce that the Power 
Marketing Conference will be held in San Francisco, California on June 6-7, 2001.  

The Power Marketing Conference is a two-day event that will bring together the leading power 
industry executives to discuss the latest trends in the industry and to share their 
experience and knowledge.  The conference will be held at the Sheraton San Francisco 
Hotel and Conference Center in San Francisco, California.  The conference will be 
hosted by the Power

The purpose of this seminar is to provide an overview of the mental health 
issues facing the community and to provide a forum for the community 
to share their experiences and concerns.  The seminar will be held at 
the Hyatt Regency Houston, located at the corner of Westheimer and Lamar.  

The seminar will be held from 9:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m.  The cost is $10 
per person.  

Please RSVP to Kim at ext. 3-6992.  

Thank you.

Kim

10/27/2001
Dow Jones Energy Service
(Copyright (c) 2001, Dow Jones & Company, Inc.)

NEW DELHI -(Dow Jones)- Enron Corp. (ENE) has agreed to sell its stake in the Dabhol Power
Project in India to the Maharashtra State Electricity Board (MSEB) for $1.5 billion,
according to a statement issued by the company. 
The Dabhol Power Project is a 1,184-megawatt, $2.5 billion power plant in the western
Indian state of Maharashtra. 
The project is one of the largest foreign direct investment projects in India. 
Enron's stake in the project is worth $1.5 billion, according to the statement. 
The company will retain a controlling 65% stake in the project. 
The MSEB will take over the project's management and will be responsible for
operating the plant.
